heroes.name: Shelly
sentences: Shelly is the first Brawler you get.
She shoots a wide shotgun blast.
She is very strong close up.
Her Super shoots a big powerful blast.
She is easy to play and great for beginners.

heroes.name: Colt
sentences: Colt is a cowboy with two pistols.
He shoots fast and far.
His bullets travel a long distance.
His Super shoots even more bullets.
He is good for beginners who like shooting.

heroes.name: Bull
sentences: Bull is a strong fighter with a big shotgun.
He has a lot of health.
He can charge forward like a bull.
His Super makes him run fast and crash into enemies.
He is great for close range fights.

heroes.name: El Primo
sentences: El Primo is a masked wrestler.
He punches enemies with strong fists.
He has very high health.
His Super makes him jump and land on enemies.
He is fun for close range battles.

heroes.name: Nita
sentences: Nita throws shockwaves at enemies.
She is a young girl with a bear hat.
Her Super calls a bear named Bruce.
Bruce chases and attacks enemies.
She is good for controlling the map.

heroes.name: Poco
sentences: Poco is a musician with a guitar.
He can heal his teammates.
His attack shoots musical notes.
His Super heals everyone nearby.
He is a great helper for the team.

heroes.name: Spike
sentences: Spike is a cactus character.
He throws bombs at enemies.
He is small but very dangerous.
His bombs do a lot of damage.
He is great for long range attacks.

heroes.name: Mortis
sentences: Mortis is a vampire with a shovel.
He dashes forward to attack.
He heals himself when he hits enemies.
His Super drains life from multiple enemies.
He is fast and tricky to play.

heroes.name: Leon
sentences: Leon is a chameleon boy.
He can go invisible so enemies cannot see him.
He uses surprise attacks.
His Super makes him invisible for a long time.
He is great for sneaking up on enemies.

heroes.name: Crow
sentences: Crow is a fast bird with poison daggers.
His attacks poison enemies.
The poison slows enemies down.
He is very quick and hard to hit.
His Super makes him fly and throw daggers everywhere.
